cases.given: one admitted turn with ordered bounded chunks
cases.expect: sequence starts at one, chunks precede exactly one terminal event and history is authoritative

cases.given: Last-Event-ID resumes at a committed durable event
cases.expect: the duplicate event is ignored without reissuing a provider request

cases.given: the renderer selects another conversation before a late event arrives
cases.expect: late chunk, queue and done records cannot alter the new conversation

cases.given: cursor retention, revision disorder or slow consumer requires resync
cases.expect: the renderer reloads history and queue then resumes without submitting another message

cases.given: the Chat flag changes after a turn was admitted
cases.expect: stop and terminal ownership remain with the origin runtime; no cross-runtime adoption occurs

cases.given: provider or tool output contains protected fields or absolute path-looking text
cases.expect: REST, SSE, logs and evidence omit the value and record only bounded safe metadata

cases.given: the sender loses transport after admission
cases.expect: the renderer does not replay the mutation; same key resolves only to the original admission
